product_updates.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
product_updates.content: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

product_updates.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
product_updates.content: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
product_updates.content: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

product_updates.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
product_updates.content: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

product_updates.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
product_updates.content: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

product_updates.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
product_updates.content: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

product_updates.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
product_updates.content: Two days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

product_updates.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
product_updates.content: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

product_updates.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
product_updates.content: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

product_updates.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
product_updates.content: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
technical_breakthroughs.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."

technical_breakthroughs.title: Repositioning retail for the AI era
technical_breakthroughs.content: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping retail, but not in the ways consumers might immediately notice. The biggest transformation may not be flashy virtual try-ons or chatbot shopping assistants, but in how decisions are made behind the scenes: how products surface in search results, how in…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: Europe’s heat wave hits the grid, and IBM’s chip targets Moore’s Law
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants Europe is in the middle of a record-breaking heat wave, and the grid is being pushed to its limits as peopl…

technical_breakthroughs.title: What Europe’s heat wave means for the power grid
technical_breakthroughs.content: It’s been hard to look away from headlines about the European heat wave this week. Temperatures are breaking records across the continent, and the weather is threatening lives, shutting down schools, and in one particularly ironic case, forcing the cancellation of a London Climate Action Week eve…

technical_breakthroughs.title: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
technical_breakthroughs.content: IBM has built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail, which is twice the density of the company’s previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021. The design could pave the way for faster and more energy efficient computers for years to…
